name: Robin Powered Workplace API
what_it_does: Robin Powered REST API for office and hybrid workplace management platform. Enables AI agents to query desk and room availability, create space reservations, access visitor management data, retrieve occupancy analytics, and integrate workplace coordination into calendar and HR workflows. Robin is developer-friendly with a well-documented REST API.
use_cases: Querying office desk and room availability from workplace assistant agents
Creating desk and meeting room reservations from hybrid work coordination agents
Retrieving space utilization analytics from facilities planning agents
Integrating Robin office data into calendar, HR, and Slack workflow agents
not_for: Consumer co-working space booking without enterprise account
Large-scale facility management without hybrid workplace focus
best_when: An organization using Robin Powered wants AI agents to help employees navigate hybrid work, book spaces, and provide facilities teams with occupancy analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Workspace booking reveals employee presence patterns and office attendance. Handle per employment law and internal data governance policies.

auth.notes: Robin API supports API key auth and OAuth 2.0. Developer access through Robin developer portal. Personal access tokens and org-level API keys available.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter and Enterprise plans; pricing per seat
pricing.notes: Robin is enterprise workplace management. Contact sales for API-inclusive pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per organization; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Office presence and booking data reveals employee attendance patterns
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Robin API is more developer-friendly than most workplace management platforms
Organization ID required as path parameter on most API calls
Availability queries require understanding Robin's space/amenity/seat hierarchy
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee presence and office attendance data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. More developer-accessible than competitor workplace APIs.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee presence data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes.
